regions: Rest of North and South America

supply_chain.dependencies: More than half of wafer requirements sourced from third-party foundries including TSMC. Single-source suppliers for highly specialized processing services or materials. Tensions across Taiwan Strait could disrupt TSMC operations.
supply_chain.risks: Limited or delayed access to raw materials and supplies due to global trade issues, supply chain constraints, natural disasters, public health emergencies. Concentration risk with TSMC and other foundries. Inability of key suppliers to deliver sufficient quantities could force engagement of replacement suppliers resulting in delays.

regulatory_risks: Export Administration Regulations compliance
International Traffic and Arms Regulations compliance
Customs and export regulations including restrictions on exports to certain companies or third parties doing business with such companies
Export classifications changes
Duties and tariffs including with respect to China
CHIPS and Science Act of 2022 compliance and performance obligations
Tax law changes in U.S., Ireland and worldwide
Price protection and competition practices regulations
Anti-boycott regulations
AI regulations including European Union AI Act
Data privacy regulations including GDPR, PIPL, CCPA
Cybersecurity regulations including SEC disclosure requirements
Environmental regulations including PFAS restrictions
Health and safety standards (ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018)
Substance content regulations and conflict minerals reporting
ESG disclosure requirements
Antitrust regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Immigration laws and procedures
U.S. government contracting regulations including Federal Acquisition Regulations
Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification requirements
Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) for digital healthcare solutions

sanction_risks: Sanctions imposed by governments in countries where company does business
Export restrictions limiting ability to sell to certain Chinese companies
Export restrictions to third parties doing business with restricted Chinese companies
Potential reputational damage from unauthorized misuse of U.S. chips in Russian weapon systems
U.S.-China trade tensions and potential tariffs from incoming administration
Risk of being viewed as unreliable supplier due to export restrictions
